title: Frontier Code (GPT-5.6 VS Mythos): This BENCHMARK is ACTUALLY REAL!
summary: Cognition released FrontierCode, a benchmark that measures code mergeability and pull request quality rather than just test passage. It uses blocker criteria and maintainer-defined rubrics on tasks from 36 open-source repositories, evaluating whether AI-generated code meets production standards across multiple programming languages.
